majors.rawMinGpa: 3.3 minimum cumulative college GPA (successful transfer applicants typically present a 3.3 or higher, with competitive candidates often significantly higher)
majors.rawMinCredits: 12 semester credit hours minimum completed after high school graduation, or attempted at least one semester of full-time coursework
requiredCourses: MATH 1341 - Calculus I for Science and Engineering
PHYS 1151/1152/1153 - Physics I for Engineering with Lab (Calculus-based)
ENGW 1111 - First-Year Writing
recommendedCourses: CHEM 1151/1152/1153 - General Chemistry for Engineers with Lab
MATH 1342 - Calculus II for Science and Engineering
PHYS 1155/1156/1157 - Physics II for Engineering with Lab
